description: Time gap finding must be parsed with segment evidence.

input.compatibilityReportRaw: { "findings": [{ "findingId": "f003", "kind": "time_gap", "severity": "error", "title": "Gap between segments", "description": "Segment seg-2 starts at 3500ms but seg-1 ends at 3200ms, leaving 300ms gap", "evidencePackets": [{ "id": "ep1", "sourceType": "segment", "sourceId": "seg-1", "quote": "0-3200ms", "confidence": 1.0, "reasonCode": "time_gap" }, { "id": "ep2", "sourceType": "segment", "sourceId": "seg-2", "quote": "3500-5000ms", "confidence": 1.0, "reasonCode": "time_gap" }], "recommendedAction": "Adjust segment boundaries or insert filler annotation" }], "summary": "One time gap affects ELAN export fidelity.", "exportTargets": ["elan"] }
